skill.body:
# Depreciation Calculation
## Overview This skill focuses on the financial valuation of assets over time using the straight-line depreciation method, supporting accurate book value tracking and financial reporting.
## Core Concepts - **Straight-Line Method**: Depreciation = (Purchase Value - Salvage Value) / Useful Life - **Useful Life**: Configurable per asset category (e.g., Hardware = 3 years, Furniture = 10 years) - **Book Value**: Current asset value after accumulated depreciation - **Salvage Value**: Estimated residual value at end of useful life
## Key Responsibilities - Configure depreciation parameters per asset category - Calculate and record periodic depreciation entries - Monitor assets approaching full depreciation for disposal or renewal decisions - Generate depreciation reports for financial and audit purposes
## Inputs & Outputs - **Inputs**: Purchase price, purchase date, useful life, salvage value - **Outputs**: Annual depreciation amount, accumulated depreciation, current book value
## Related Entities - Asset, Category
skill.description: Ability to apply and manage straight-line depreciation calculations for organizational assets with configurable useful life per asset category.
skill.name: Depreciation Calculation
